candidates.label: flux-i2i-parchment
candidates.prompt: antique hand-drawn map of feudal Japan, aged sepia parchment, top-down bird's-eye cartography, forested green land and faded blue sea, tiny Sengoku-era castles, torii gates and pagodas drawn as small pictograms not to scale, mountains as little drawn peaks, compass rose, weathered ink linework, vintage watercolour wash, no modern text, no grid, no horizon

candidates.label: flux-i2i-military
candidates.prompt: antique Japanese military campaign map (ezu) of the Sengoku period, top-down, muted earth tones on aged paper, drawn fortifications and castle glyphs not to scale, roads and domain boundaries, small town markers, forested land and calm sea, hand-inked, weathered, no modern text, no grid, no horizon

candidates.label: flux-i2i-sumie
candidates.prompt: sumi-e ink wash map on aged rice paper, top-down, sparse and elegant, black brush strokes, mountains and pine groves as ink strokes, small castle and pagoda ink pictograms not to scale, pale grey-blue sea, restrained colour, antique scroll, no modern text, no grid, no horizon
